nasb.text: “And you, son of man, thus says the Lord God to the land of Israel, ‘An end! The end is coming on the four corners of the land.

esv.text: “And you, O son of man, thus says the Lord God to the land of Israel: An end! The end has come upon the four corners of the land.

cnv.text: “人子啊！主耶和華對以色列地這樣說： ‘終局到了！終局臨到這地的四境了！

ccb.text: “人子啊，主耶和华对以色列这样说，‘结局到了，以色列全境的结局到了！
